title: pelargonium × expansum
intro: Pelargonium × expansum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × expansum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × expansum include tea, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
